# Clients registry & presence

> *Generated from `protocol/lexicons/client.json` — edit the source, then run `make book`.*

A clients directory entry: a durable bus-issued identity joined with live presence (ADR-0020). Stored under the client's verified id; identity is a bus-minted ULID (the primary id and registry key); display_name is the human label, unique by convention. The record is written once at issuance (clients.register) and removed only by retire; presence is derived at read time, not stored.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | yes | Client's verified identity: a bus-minted ULID; must equal the registry key. |
| `display_name` | string |  | Human-readable label minted with the credential; unique by convention, not by the bus. |
| `kind` | string | yes | Client kind (e.g. worker, reviewer), declared at issuance. |
| `epoch` | integer | yes | Protocol epoch the identity was issued under. |
| `issued_at` | string (datetime) | yes | Bus-stamped RFC3339 time the identity was minted. |
| `presence` | string |  | Derived at read time, not stored: "online" iff an authenticated connection for this identity exists right now, else "offline". |
